{{CargoRelic
|name=Erinyes’ Shackles
|class_id=21240
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Forged by Atropos, these bronze shackles were used in trials under moonlit Athens. The Erinyes pursued blood crimes until Athena cast her deciding pebble. A symbol of the shift from vengeance to civic justice in ancient law.
|fame=68
|art=75
|fth=107
|civ=48
|tech=64
|ss1=Zombie Minion ATK +3%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +36<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +36
|ss2=Zombie Minion ATK +4%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +48<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +48
|ss3=Zombie Minion ATK +5%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +60<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +60
|ss4=Zombie Minion ATK +7%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +84<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +84
|ss5=Zombie Minion ATK +9%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +108<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +108
|ss6=Zombie Minion ATK +12%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +144<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +144
|ss7=Zombie Minion ATK +12%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +144<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +144<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop RUSH +120 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill3=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, 2x Card Drops +15%
}}
